<think> The Centro Intercultural de Documentacion is a research and documentation center based in Barcelona, Spain. I need to find the name of the Croatian-Austrian philosopher who founded it and his title in the Roman Catholic church, if any. I know that there is a philosopher named Ivan Illich who was born in Prague, Czechoslovakia (now Czech Republic), but he is not Austrian. I need to look for a Croatian philosopher with Austrian connections. Let's check if there is any other Croatian philosopher who held a title in the Roman Catholic church. </think>

<answer> I'm sorry for the confusion earlier. The Croatian philosopher who founded the Centro Intercultural de Documentacion and held a title in the Roman Catholic church is Ivan Illich. However, he was born in Prague, Czechoslovakia, not in Croatia. He was actually a Roman Catholic priest before he left the priesthood in 1961. </answer>

<boxed> Ivan Illich </boxed>
